structured_fields.name: symptoms
structured_fields.description: Key signs and symptoms of the disease — each with frequency and severity properties

structured_fields.name: disease_stages
structured_fields.description: Clinical stages of disease progression — LLM determines appropriate properties based on disease context and clinical reality

items.description: Each stage object should include properties that best describe that clinical stage. Suggested: name, severity, key_features, typical_duration. Use clinical judgment.

structured_fields.name: complications
structured_fields.description: Notable complications associated with disease progression

freetext_fields.name: natural_history_prognosis
freetext_fields.description: Narrative covering the natural disease course — how it typically evolves over time, factors influencing prognosis, survival outcomes and quality of life impact

prompt_hints.tone: clinical and descriptive — written for a medically literate audience
avoid: listing symptoms without frequency or severity context
overly optimistic prognosis statements without evidence
prefer: symptoms ordered from most to least common
staging that reflects recognised clinical classifications where they exist
prognosis narrative that acknowledges variability across patient populations
